blockers.description: credits_remaining in usage_tracking not updating after successful license redemption. Admin client update query returns no error but DB value stays at 2.
blockers.workaround: Debug logs added in commit 54250af. Need Vercel runtime logs from a fresh redemption attempt to diagnose root cause.

decisions.rationale: User created these on Gumroad with permalinks wmmnhz/wkfkih/irpqju

decisions.decision: Use base64 product ID (not permalink) as product_id in Gumroad license verify API
decisions.rationale: Gumroad API requires internal product ID. IDs: 10cr=tYtvc16VQuecUnFp54Szww==, 20cr=b719PQqdbT4Wd9kSayFQSA==, 40cr=OmdGKqdeve6mG2HLe9SmzA==

decisions.decision: Admin client (service role) used for DB mutations, user client for auth only
decisions.rationale: usage_tracking has SELECT-only RLS for users; writes require service role

next_action: Get [credits] log lines from Vercel runtime logs after redeeming a fresh license key on the deployed commit 54250af. The logs will show whether user.id, the SELECT row, and the UPDATE result look correct.
context_notes: License verification (Gumroad API call) works correctly — correct product matched, uses count checked, increment confirmed. The bug is specifically in the Supabase admin client update that follows. The update returns no error but credits_remaining stays at 2. Hypothesis: either 0 rows matched (user_id mismatch somehow) or the update is being rolled back. Debug logs added to surface the actual DB state.
